posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there anyway to mass bring archived items back to a board?

I know you can search archived items by “Search Everything” function or bring individual jobs back by clicking “Restore” after being in a board, checking “board settings” and “archived history”. I want to know if there is a way to mass bring back archived items. Thanks!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mw01

At the moment there is no way to mass select items in the Archive to restore them to the board I’m afraid.
You would need to manually restore each of these to the board, unfortunately.

I can definitely appreciate how this would be a useful addition to the platform for yourself, and I’m sure for other teams too, so I would highly recommend opening a thread in our Feature Request section.
Here other users who would also like this added to the platform will be able to upvote the feature!
You can find this here: Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum

Best,
Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great!

I’m going to go ahead and mark my previous answer as the solution, which will cause the thread to close after 7 days if there are no further responses to the thread.

Please feel free to let us know if you have any additional questions on this or if anything wasn’t clear and we’d be happy to continue to assist.
If not, the thread will close automatically once the 7 days have passed!

Thanks,
Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
